# M1K3 for Mac

> M1K3 is a free, open-source, privacy-first AI companion for macOS that runs
> entirely on-device. Local LLM inference (Gemma via MLX-Swift + Apple
> Foundation Models), live voice (streaming STT/TTS), a personal knowledge
> graph with RAG over your documents, consent-gated encrypted call
> transcription, a local tool-using agent, and an MCP server. Zero bytes of
> user data leave the Mac. Requires Apple Silicon and macOS 26 Tahoe. Native
> SwiftUI (Liquid Glass), not Electron. Made by Round Tower, Ireland.

Key facts:
- Privacy: all inference, embeddings, voice, and storage are on-device; the
  optional web-search tool is off by default
- Models: Gemma (MLX-Swift, Metal) and Apple Foundation Models, hot-swappable
- Storage: app-sandboxed, GRDB, encrypted with a Keychain-held key
- MCP server tools: search_knowledge, list_documents, get_document (stdio)
- License/source: open source, https://github.com/Round-Tower/m1k3

## Docs

- [Repository and build-from-source](https://github.com/Round-Tower/m1k3): monorepo; the Mac app lives in macos/
- [macOS app plan](https://github.com/Round-Tower/m1k3/blob/master/macos/PLAN.md): architecture and roadmap

## Answers

- [M1K3 vs Ollama](https://m1k3.app/vs-ollama): Ollama is a model server you build on; M1K3 is a finished on-device companion app — fair comparison table
- [Private ChatGPT alternative for Mac](https://m1k3.app/private-chatgpt-alternative-mac): privacy by architecture vs by policy; M1K3 vs Ollama vs LM Studio vs the ChatGPT desktop app
- [How to run a local LLM on a Mac](https://m1k3.app/local-llm-mac-guide): hardware needs plus the four routes — Ollama, LM Studio, MLX, M1K3
- [Give Claude a local memory with MCP](https://m1k3.app/mcp-knowledge-server): connect Claude Code/Desktop to M1K3's knowledge at http://127.0.0.1:4242/mcp
- [Is M1K3 really private?](https://m1k3.app/privacy): the privacy architecture — what runs on-device, the three documented network crossings (opt-in model downloads, off-by-default web search, updates), and how to verify

## Optional

- [Launch site](https://m1k3.app/): product overview and FAQ
- [Meet the companions](https://m1k3.app/companions): the opt-in 3D voice-mode creatures — Fox, Inkfish, Sparrow, Gecko, Colobus — rendered on-device with RealityKit
- [Round Tower](https://round-tower.ie): the company behind M1K3
